note: Curated Anthropic-wire endpoint overlay. This is the source of anthropic-wire TRUTH: the catalog builder JOINS these entries (by id) with models.dev model metadata. baseUrl values are the exact verified Anthropic Messages endpoints — Claude Code / ccx appends /v1/messages. Never api.anthropic.com. local:true providers run on the same machine (no key needed). Only the providers listed here are anthropic-capable and eligible for inclusion.

deepseek.name: DeepSeek
deepseek.keyHint: sk-... key from platform.deepseek.com. Passed as ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN.
deepseek.notes: Verified native Anthropic endpoint — cite DeepSeek Anthropic API guide (api-docs.deepseek.com/guides/anthropic_api). Messages at /anthropic/v1/messages; tool use fully supported (disable_parallel_tool_use ignored; no image input / MCP orchestration).

moonshot-kimi.name: Moonshot AI / Kimi
moonshot-kimi.keyHint: sk-... key from platform.kimi.ai/console/api-keys (formerly platform.moonshot.ai). Passed as ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN.
moonshot-kimi.notes: Verified native Anthropic endpoint — cite Kimi agent-support doc (platform.kimi.ai/docs/guide/agent-support). Messages at /anthropic/v1/messages; documented Claude Code target. Model IDs are Kimi-native (kimi-k2 family) — map via CCX_ALIAS_*.

zai-glm.name: Z.ai (GLM)
zai-glm.keyHint: Z.ai API key from z.ai/manage-apikey/apikey-list (create at z.ai/model-api). Passed as ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN.
zai-glm.notes: Verified native Anthropic endpoint — cite Z.ai Claude Code doc (docs.z.ai/devpack/tool/claude). Messages at /api/anthropic/v1/messages; first-class Claude Code target. Model IDs are GLM-native (glm-4.x/glm-5.x, some with [1m] long-context suffix) — map via CCX_ALIAS_*. models.dev id: zai (aka zhipuai / z-ai).

minimax.name: MiniMax
minimax.keyHint: MiniMax API key from platform.minimax.io. Passed as ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN.
minimax.notes: Verified native Anthropic endpoint — cite MiniMax Claude Code doc (platform.minimax.io/docs/token-plan/claude-code). Messages at /anthropic/v1/messages; tool use + streaming supported. Model IDs: MiniMax-M2 family — map via CCX_ALIAS_*.

qwen-dashscope.name: Qwen / Alibaba DashScope
qwen-dashscope.keyHint: sk-... DashScope API key from Alibaba Cloud Model Studio (bailian console). Passed as ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN.
qwen-dashscope.notes: Verified Anthropic-wire endpoint — cite Alibaba Cloud Model Studio Claude Code guide. International base https://dashscope-intl.aliyuncs.com/apps/anthropic (China host: dashscope.aliyuncs.com). Model IDs Qwen-native (qwen3-coder-plus, qwen3-max) — map via CCX_ALIAS_*. models.dev id: alibaba.

xiaomi.name: Xiaomi MiMo
xiaomi.keyHint: Xiaomi MiMo API key from the MiMo developer console. Passed as ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN.
xiaomi.notes: Verified native Anthropic endpoint at https://api.xiaomimimo.com/anthropic (messages at /anthropic/v1/messages). Serves Xiaomi MiMo models — map via CCX_ALIAS_*. models.dev id: xiaomi (mimo).

deepinfra.name: DeepInfra
deepinfra.keyHint: long bearer token, no fixed prefix (from deepinfra.com dashboard). Passed as ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN.
deepinfra.notes: Verified native Anthropic endpoint — cite DeepInfra Anthropic integration doc (docs.deepinfra.com/integrations/anthropic). Messages at /anthropic/v1/messages; officially documented for Claude Code + Anthropic SDKs. Large open-model catalog under vendor/model IDs — map via CCX_ALIAS_*.

novita.name: Novita AI
novita.keyHint: sk_... key from novita.ai. Passed as ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN.
novita.notes: Verified native Anthropic endpoint — cite Novita Claude Code doc (novita.ai/docs/guides/claude-code). Messages at /anthropic/v1/messages. Open-weight models under vendor/model IDs (moonshotai/*, deepseek/*, qwen/*, glm) — map via CCX_ALIAS_*.

fireworks.name: Fireworks AI
fireworks.keyHint: fw_... key from fireworks.ai dashboard. Passed as ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN.
fireworks.notes: Anthropic-compatible endpoint rooted at https://api.fireworks.ai/inference (Claude Code / ccx appends /v1/messages). Serves open-weight models under accounts/fireworks/models/* IDs — map via CCX_ALIAS_*. models.dev id: fireworks-ai.

baseten.name: Baseten
baseten.keyHint: Baseten API key from app.baseten.co settings. Passed as ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN.
baseten.notes: Anthropic-compatible endpoint (BETA) rooted at https://inference.baseten.co (Claude Code / ccx appends /v1/messages). Model Library / dedicated deployment IDs — map via CCX_ALIAS_*. Verify the /v1/messages path before trusting in production.

cloudflare-ai-gateway.name: Cloudflare AI Gateway
cloudflare-ai-gateway.keyHint: Cloudflare API token with the 'AI Gateway: Run' permission (create at dash.cloudflare.com/profile/api-tokens). Passed as ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN (CCX_TOKEN = the CF token).
cloudflare-ai-gateway.notes: Meta-router: unified REST endpoint speaks the Anthropic Messages wire and routes 350+ models across OpenAI/Anthropic/Google/Groq/xAI/Workers AI via a {provider}/{model} model string. Upstream provider keys are configured server-side via BYOK / Unified Billing in the Cloudflare dashboard — no second key needed here. The literal <ACCOUNT_ID> placeholder in baseUrl MUST be substituted with your Cloudflare account id at onboarding (see onboarding.cjs ACCOUNT_ID prompt). No live models-list endpoint exists (modelsEndpoint:null) — the model list below is a hand-curated seed, same pattern as the sambanova/vllm manual entries; use the {provider}/ prefix exactly as shown when picking a model.

sambanova.name: SambaNova
sambanova.keyHint: SambaNova Cloud API key from cloud.sambanova.ai. Passed as ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN.
sambanova.notes: Anthropic-compatible endpoint rooted at https://api.sambanova.ai/v1 (Claude Code / ccx appends /messages). Not present in models.dev — the list below is a hand-curated seed (SambaNova does not publish per-token prices here; use 'Fetch models' against modelsEndpoint for the live catalog). Map via CCX_ALIAS_*.

openrouter.name: OpenRouter
openrouter.keyHint: sk-or-v1-... (OpenRouter API key from openrouter.ai/keys). Passed as ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN.
openrouter.notes: Verified native Anthropic endpoint ('Anthropic Skin') — cite OpenRouter Claude Code integration doc. Base https://openrouter.ai/api; Claude Code appends /v1/messages. Thinking blocks, native tool use, streaming, multi-turn all pass through. Model IDs are OpenRouter vendor/model slugs — map via CCX_ALIAS_*.

together.name: Together AI
together.keyHint: Together API key from api.together.ai settings. Passed as ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN.
together.notes: Base rooted at https://api.together.xyz (Claude Code / ccx appends /v1/messages). CAUTION: verify /v1/messages Anthropic-wire support before trusting — Together is primarily OpenAI-wire and may require an external Anthropic gateway. Open-weight model IDs — map via CCX_ALIAS_*.

ollama.name: Ollama
ollama.keyHint: No API key — local server. ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN may be any non-empty placeholder.
ollama.notes: LOCAL server at http://localhost:11434. Ollama is OpenAI-wire natively, so an external Anthropic gateway (claude-code-router / LiteLLM) is required to speak /v1/messages — sidewrite stays Anthropic-wire-only. Local model tags — map via CCX_ALIAS_*.

lmstudio.name: LM Studio
lmstudio.keyHint: No API key — local server. ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN may be any non-empty placeholder.
lmstudio.notes: LOCAL server at http://localhost:1234. LM Studio is OpenAI-wire natively, so an external Anthropic gateway (claude-code-router / LiteLLM) is required to speak /v1/messages. Local loaded-model IDs — map via CCX_ALIAS_*.

vllm.name: vLLM (self-hosted)
vllm.keyHint: No API key by default — DIY self-hosted server. ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN may be any non-empty placeholder unless you configured one.
vllm.notes: LOCAL / DIY self-hosted server at http://localhost:8000 (host/port depends on your launch). Not in models.dev and there is no fixed catalog — the served model is whatever you launched vLLM with; fetch modelsEndpoint to enumerate. vLLM serves OpenAI-wire, so an external Anthropic gateway (claude-code-router / LiteLLM) is required to speak /v1/messages. Map via CCX_ALIAS_*.
